title: Red Concord Checkpoint
notes: Art upgrade for D3 Red Concord Checkpoint.
Connects C3 Main Civic Gate, E3 Red Route Control, and D4 Vendor Backroute / Checkpoint Backlot.
Checkpoint gatehouse, route scanner, search lanes, barricades, vehicle impound, and custody/service backlot.
Ground items render below Donny/NPC bodies.
